steps.title: Outline the paragraph
steps.content: Sentence 1 names community science (a research approach). Sentence 2 lists three benefits (conservation, youth interest, more data). Sentence 3 mentions a specific study by Merrill that used the approach.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content:
C exactly captures: identifies an approach, lists benefits, mentions a study using it. A wrongly says the study's results are presented; B claims an argument and public opinion that aren't there; D talks about development and future projects, which the text never does.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
